LAW AND MOTION 301, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU INC'S MOTION TO AMEND JUDGMENT IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT PRESENTED SUFFICIENT EVIDENCE TO JUSTIFY ADDING THE NEW PARTY TO THE JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL IS DIRECTED TO READ AND COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6(B). PREVAILING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR #8189 (301/PJB)

MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. KENNETH J. FREED, TEL. NO. (818) 990-0888 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF BY TELEPHONE APPEARAMCE;
ATTY. RUSSELL B. LONGAWAY, TEL. NO. 788-2012 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU INC'S Motion To Amend Judgment is denied. Plaintiff has not presented sufficient evidence to justify adding the new party to the judgment. Plaintiff's counsel is directed to read and comply with Local Rule 2.6(B). Prevailing party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189 =(301/PJB)
